name: Drawer
summary: Minimal sliding drawer component akin to MUI's Drawer.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled visibility

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Default for uncontrolled

props.name: anchor
props.description: Drawer side

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback fired when user requests close

props.name: size
props.description: Size (width or height depending on anchor)

props.name: disableBackdropClick
props.description: Disable closing via backdrop click

props.name: disableEscapeKeyDown
props.description: Disable closing via ESC key

props.name: persistent
props.description: Drawer remains visible without backdrop

props.name: adaptive
props.description: Adaptive behaviour (persistent in landscape, overlay in portrait)

props.name: toggleIcon
props.description: Icon for the portrait toggle button

props.name: closeIcon
props.description: Close button icon when portrait

props.name: children
props.description: Drawer contents

props.name: className
props.description: Class applied to the Drawer panel root

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles applied to the Drawer panel root

props.name: sx
props.description: sx convenience for inline styles with CSS var support

props.name: 'aria-label'
props.description:
Accessible name for the dialog. Required (alongside `aria-labelledby`) for
non-persistent/overlay Drawers, which are real `role='dialog'` modals; a
dev warning fires when neither is provided. Ignored by persistent Drawers,
which are inline navigation regions, not dialogs.

props.name: 'aria-labelledby'
props.description: Id of an element labelling the dialog (alternative to `aria-label`).

props.name: aria-label
props.description:
Accessible name for the dialog. Required (alongside `aria-labelledby`) for
non-persistent/overlay Drawers, which are real `role='dialog'` modals; a
dev warning fires when neither is provided. Ignored by persistent Drawers,
which are inline navigation regions, not dialogs.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: Id of an element labelling the dialog (alternative to `aria-label`).

props.name: preset
props.description: One or many style-preset names registered via `definePreset()`

bestPractices: Use for secondary navigation or tools; avoid blocking critical flows (use `Modal` for decisions).
Coordinate with AppBar and Surface so the drawer doesn’t overlap or hide important content.
Use persistent vs temporary modes appropriately; auto‑collapse on narrow screens.
Keep content scannable and avoid deep nesting; provide headings for sections.
Prefer tokens for backdrop colour and motion; keep transitions aligned with theme.

Overlay (non-persistent) Drawers are modal dialogs: they expose `role='dialog'` + `aria-modal`, trap Tab focus, move focus into the panel on open, and restore it on close. Always give them an accessible name via `aria-label` or `aria-labelledby` (a dev warning fires when neither is set).
Persistent Drawers are inline navigation regions — they intentionally carry no dialog semantics, no focus trap, and need no `aria-label`.
